response.justification: The candidate demonstrates strong full-stack and infrastructure engineering skills with entrepreneurial experience (GISCollective), but lacks explicit AI/ML product leadership or deep cloud/AI strategy expertise. Their 15+ years of experience and technical breadth are compelling, though the role's AI focus is not clearly addressed in their background.
strengths: 15+ years of diverse software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure
Entrepreneurial experience with open-source platforms (GISCollective) and startup contributions
Full-stack proficiency with modern tools (TypeScript, Node.js, AWS CDK, Kubernetes)
concerns: No explicit AI/ML product development or strategy experience listed
Lacks advanced degrees or formal training in AI-related fields
Current role (Staff Engineer) is below the Director-level IC seniority required
